messages.content: translate 央企一般流程较慢，具体可根据项目情况加快	内部决策中	否	中银	中银项目团队6月4日拜访，尽快推动后续领导拜访

State-owned enterprises generally have a slower process, but it can be expedited based on the specific project situation during internal decision-making. No, this is not relevant to Bank of China. The Bank of China project team visited on June 4th to accelerate subsequent leadership visits.
I'm sorry, but there is no text to translate. Please provide text for me to translate.
translate 社保基金看中先正达在农业安全方面的战略地位，但从过往案例来看，社保基金未直接参与战略配售，多由旗下管理人参与，需要推动其直接投资模式

The Social Security Fund is interested in the strategic position of Xianzhengda in agricultural safety, but according to past cases, the Social Security Fund has not directly participated in strategic allocations. Instead, it has been mainly through its subsidiaries' fund managers. Therefore, efforts are needed to promote a direct investment model for the Social Security Fund.

translate 有兴趣接触
待进一步沟通
央企一般流程较慢，具体可根据项目情况加快
内部决策中
中银项目团队6月4日拜访，尽快推动后续领导拜访

Interested in further contact. The State-owned enterprise generally has a slower process, but it can be expedited based on the specific project situation during internal decision-making process. The Bank of China project team visited on June 4th and will work to accelerate subsequent leadership visits as soon as possible.
I'm sorry, but there is no text to translate. Please provide text for me to translate.
Please provide the text that needs to be translated.

transalte 团队积极推进 工信部已经同意，董事长吴海也比较支持 配合聆讯时间表完成决策 已征得网信办同意，推进内部最后投决流程中 否 中信 暂时无需领导介入 
社保基金看中先正达在农业安全方面的战略地位，但从过往案例来看，社保基金未直接参与战略配售，多由旗下管理人参与，需要推动其直接投资模式 金理事长对于项目高度认可 1个月 金理事长已经带队拜访 不涉及 中信 金理事长本周带队拜访，中信正确定分管股权投资的王文灵理事长时间，争取安排下周会面

The team is actively pushing forward, and the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology has agreed. Chairman Wu Hai is also quite supportive. We will collaborate and complete the decision-making process according to the hearing schedule. The Cyberspace Administration of China has agreed, and we are advancing in the final internal investment decision process. No, this is not relevant to CITIC. There is no need for leadership intervention at the moment.

The Social Security Fund is interested in the strategic position of Xianzhengda in agricultural safety. However, according to past cases, the Social Security Fund has not directly participated in strategic allocations. Instead, it has mainly been through its subsidiaries' fund managers. It is necessary to promote a direct investment mode. Chairman Jin highly recognizes the project, and he has led a team to visit for a month. No, this does not involve CITIC. Chairman Jin will lead a team to visit this week, and CITIC is arranging a meeting next week with Chairman Wang Wenling who is in charge of equity investment.
translate 金理事长本周带队拜访，中信正确定分管股权投资的王文灵理事长时间，争取安排下周会面
Chairman Jin will lead a team to visit this week, and CITIC is arranging a meeting next week with Chairman Wang Wenling, who is in charge of equity investment, to try to schedule a meeting.
translate 金理事长本周已经带队拜访，
"金理事长本周已经带队拜访" translates to "Chairman Jin has already led a team to visit this week".
